NeuralFlow AI // Intern Machine Learning Engineer

San Francisco, CA | Internship (Full-time, 3-month summer position with potential conversion) |

$25-30 per hour (approximately $5,200-6,240 for 3-month internship, 40 hrs/week)

Democratizing machine learning for enterprise-scale data challenges

>> ABOUT

NeuralFlow AI is a San Francisco-based startup dedicated to building scalable machine
learning infrastructure and tools for enterprises. We help companies unlock insights from

their data through accessible, production-grade ML platforms. Our mission is to reduce the
barrier to entry for organizations seeking to implement AI-driven solutions.

>> SUMMARY

We're looking for a motivated Machine Learning Engineering intern to join our Platform team
this summer. You'll work alongside experienced ML engineers to build and optimize machine

learning pipelines, experiment with model training frameworks, and help deploy models to
production environments. This is an excellent opportunity to apply your academic knowledge

to real-world ML challenges and gain hands-on experience with industry-standard tools and
best practices.

>> RESPONSIBILITIES

- Assist in building and testing machine learning models using PyTorch and TensorFlow
under senior engineer guidance

- Help prepare and preprocess datasets for model training, ensuring data quality and
proper feature engineering

- Collaborate on implementing model training pipelines using MLflow to track experiments,
parameters, and metrics

- Support model evaluation and validation processes, including creating performance
benchmarks and documentation

- Participate in deploying trained models to staging environments using SageMaker or
Vertex AI

- Contribute to feature engineering work using our internal feature store platform,
learning best practices for feature management

- Write clean, documented Python code and participate in code reviews with the team
- Attend and present findings from weekly team meetings and research discussions

>> MUST HAVE

- Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science, Statistics,
Mathematics, or related field

- Strong foundation in Python programming with ability to write readable, functional code
- Understanding of machine learning fundamentals (supervised/unsupervised learning, model

evaluation, overfitting)
- Familiarity with data manipulation libraries (NumPy, Pandas) and data visualization

tools
- Ability to work independently and in team settings with clear communication and

willingness to learn

 >> NICE TO HAVE

- Previous internship or project experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow

- Experience with Git version control and collaborative development workflows
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Google Cloud) or containerization

(Docker/Kubernetes)

>> STACK

PyTorch / TensorFlow / Python / MLflow / AWS SageMaker / Feature Store (Tecton or Feast) / NumPy &

Pandas / Scikit-learn / Docker / Git & GitHub

>> BENEFITS

- Competitive hourly rate with relocation stipend available

- Flexible working arrangement with hybrid office access in downtown San Francisco
- Free access to online learning platforms (Coursera, DataCamp) for professional

development
- Weekly mentorship sessions with senior ML engineers on your team

- Free daily lunch and snacks in the office
- Opportunity to attend 1-2 industry conferences or workshops during the internship

>> APPLY

Please submit your resume, a brief cover letter (1 page), and a link to your GitHub profile
or portfolio showcasing any ML/data science projects to careers@neuralflow.ai. In your

cover letter, tell us about a machine learning project you're most proud of and what you
learned. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. We'll respond to shortlisted

candidates within 2 weeks.
